title: Births and Deaths Registration (Morogoro Rural District) Order, 1982
title_en: Births and Deaths Registration (Morogoro Rural District) Order, 1982

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Births and Deaths (Specified Districts) Order

The provisions of the Births and Deaths Registration Act 1 relating to compulsory registration of births and deaths shall, with effect from the first day of January, 1982 extend to the districts specified in the Schedule hereto. 1 Cap. 108 Schedule Biharamulo Iringa Rural Iringa Urban Kilwa Kiteto Maswa Tarime History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation 19 November 1982 Commenced Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
